query: "degrees celsius" song OR movie OR book

results.title: degrees - Wiktionary
results.snippet: A stage of proficiency or qualification in a course of study, now especially an award bestowed by a university or, in some countries, a college, as a certification of academic achievement. (In the United States, can include secondary schools.) | A unit of measurement of angle equal to 1/360 of a circle's circumference. | A unit of measurement of temperature on any of several scales, such as Celsius or Fahrenheit.
